title: WebArena: A Realistic Web Environment for Building Autonomous Agents
task: Long-horizon browser interaction and transaction completion
dimensions: website and account state; navigation; form and tool action; cross-site dependency; task progress; functional correctness; success

name: VisualWebArena
title: VisualWebArena: Evaluating Multimodal Agents on Realistic Visual Web Tasks
scale: 910 visually grounded tasks across 3 realistic websites
dimensions: visual and DOM state; image grounding; navigation and form action; persistent website change; task progress; functional correctness; success

name: AppWorld
title: AppWorld: A Controllable World of Apps and People for Benchmarking Interactive Coding Agents
scale: 9 apps, 457 APIs and 750 tasks with reproducible world states
dimensions: database and user state; API preconditions and effects; transaction sequence; cross-app dependency; functional correctness; task success

name: AndroidWorld
title: AndroidWorld: A Dynamic Benchmarking Environment for Autonomous Agents
scale: 116 task templates across 20 Android apps with dynamic instantiation
dimensions: device and app state; visual grounding; tap, scroll and text action; task progress; dynamic variation; programmatic success

name: ToolSandbox
title: ToolSandbox: A Stateful, Conversational, Interactive Evaluation Benchmark for LLM Tool Use Capabilities
scale: Hundreds of scenarios spanning state dependency, canonicalization, insufficient information and distraction
dimensions: hidden service state; dialogue context; tool preconditions and effects; milestone order; state similarity; task completion

name: Tau-bench
title: Tau-bench: A Benchmark for Tool-Agent-User Interaction in Real-World Domains
scale: Airline and retail domains with tools, policies, users and hundreds of tasks
dimensions: database state; user goal; dialogue state; tool sequence; policy compliance; final-state correctness; pass^k reliability

name: Tau2-bench
title: Tau2-Bench: Evaluating Conversational Agents in a Dual-Control Environment
scale: Multiple service domains with simulated users, tools, policies and stateful tasks
task: Cooperative user-agent control of shared task state
dimensions: shared and private state; user action; agent tool action; information exchange; policy compliance; final-state correctness; reliability

name: CALVIN
title: CALVIN: A Benchmark for Language-Conditioned Policy Learning for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation Tasks
scale: 24 hours of teleoperated play; 34 tasks; five-task evaluation sequences
dimensions: persistent object state; task sequence; instruction grounding; action execution; atomic success; completed sequence length; environment generalization

name: SafeBench
title: SafeBench: A Benchmarking Platform for Safety Evaluation of Autonomous Vehicles
dimensions: collision; route completion; time-to-collision; lane invasion; red-light violation; planning and control; scenario difficulty

name: Bench2Drive
title: Bench2Drive: Towards Multi-Ability Benchmarking of Closed-Loop End-to-End Autonomous Driving
scale: 44 scenario types with 2 million annotated frames
dimensions: perception; dynamic interaction; route planning; vehicle control; scenario success; infractions; driving score; ability-wise performance

name: Waymax
title: Waymax: An Accelerated, Data-Driven Simulator for Large-Scale Autonomous Driving Research
scale: Large-scale Waymo motion scenarios with GPU/TPU-parallel simulation
dimensions: road and agent state; multi-agent dynamics; vehicle action; collision; off-road behavior; imitation; route progress; simulation throughput

name: MetaDrive
title: MetaDrive: Composing Diverse Driving Scenarios for Generalizable Reinforcement Learning
scale: Procedurally generated unlimited road and traffic scenarios
task: Closed-loop driving policy training and generalization
dimensions: map and traffic state; vehicle dynamics; control; collision; route completion; safety; distribution shift; scenario generalization

name: AdvSim
title: AdvSim: Generating Safety-Critical Scenarios for Self-Driving Vehicles
scale: Adversarial variants of real-world traffic scenarios
dimensions: multi-agent trajectory; physical and map feasibility; planner collision; safety margin; route behavior; scenario realism; adversarial difficulty

name: SAFE-SIM
title: SAFE-SIM: Safety-Critical Closed-Loop Traffic Simulation with Diffusion-Controllable Adversaries
scale: Large sets of controllable safety-critical traffic rollouts
dimensions: future traffic state; actor interaction; collision risk; controllability; realism; diversity; planner response; safety outcome

name: Safety2Drive
title: Safety2Drive: Safety-Critical Scenario Benchmark for the Evaluation of Autonomous Driving
scale: Large scenario suite spanning diverse safety-critical interactions
dimensions: collision; traffic-rule violation; route completion; interactive response; scenario success; difficulty; robustness; closed-loop score

name: Bench2Drive-Robust
title: Bench2Drive-Robust: Benchmarking Closed-Loop Autonomous Driving under Deployment Perturbations
scale: Multiple deployment perturbation families and severities over Bench2Drive scenarios
dimensions: sensor state; calibration; appearance and weather shift; vehicle dynamics; route completion; collision; infraction; degradation across severity

name: Procgen
title: Leveraging Procedural Generation to Benchmark Reinforcement Learning
task: Visual game control and out-of-distribution level generalization
dimensions: dynamic game state; discrete action; episodic return; sample efficiency; train-test level gap; procedural generalization

name: MineRL
title: MineRL: A Large-Scale Dataset of Minecraft Demonstrations
scale: Over 60 million state-action pairs from human gameplay
dimensions: visual and inventory state; action sequence; resource acquisition; crafting progress; reward; task success; data efficiency

name: MineDojo
title: MineDojo: Building Open-Ended Embodied Agents with Internet-Scale Knowledge
scale: 3,142 tasks with wiki, video and forum knowledge resources
dimensions: world and inventory state; navigation; manipulation; crafting; long-horizon progress; task success; knowledge transfer

name: ViZDoom
title: ViZDoom: A Doom-Based AI Research Platform for Visual Reinforcement Learning
scale: Configurable Doom scenarios with high-throughput simulation
dimensions: visual and game state; action execution; navigation; resource and health state; reward; scenario completion; simulation throughput

name: Craftax
title: Craftax: A Lightning-Fast Benchmark for Open-Ended Reinforcement Learning
dimensions: world and inventory state; temporal survival; navigation; resource interaction; crafting sequence; combat; achievements; return

name: WorkArena
title: WorkArena: How Capable Are Web Agents at Solving Common Knowledge Work Tasks?
scale: 29 task types with randomized instances in ServiceNow
dimensions: application and record state; navigation; form action; workflow sequence; task correctness; success; instance variation

name: BrowserGym
title: The BrowserGym Ecosystem for Web Agent Research
scale: Unified access to multiple web benchmark families and thousands of tasks
dimensions: browser state; multimodal observation; action execution; task reset; reproducibility; validator outcome; cross-environment performance

name: OSWorld
title: OSWorld: Benchmarking Multimodal Agents for Open-Ended Tasks in Real Computer Environments
scale: 369 tasks across Ubuntu, Windows and macOS applications
dimensions: operating-system and application state; visual grounding; mouse and keyboard action; cross-app workflow; functional correctness; task success

name: VLN-CE
title: Beyond the Nav-Graph: Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments
scale: Thousands of instruction-path episodes in continuous Matterport3D environments
dimensions: agent pose and scene state; instruction grounding; low-level navigation action; goal distance; success; SPL; seen and unseen environment transfer

name: ALFWorld
title: ALFWorld: Aligning Text and Embodied Environments for Interactive Learning
scale: Thousands of aligned textual and embodied household tasks
task: Long-horizon instruction execution and cross-modal transfer
dimensions: object and relation state; temporal task progress; navigation; manipulation action; text-visual transfer; task success

name: VirtualHome
title: VirtualHome: Simulating Household Activities via Programs
scale: 2,821 activities represented by executable programs in multiple 3D homes
dimensions: entity and relation state; action preconditions and effects; temporal sequence; program executability; activity completion; scene grounding

name: BEHAVIOR
title: BEHAVIOR: Benchmark for Everyday Household Activities in Virtual, Interactive, and Ecological Environments
scale: 100 household activities with realistic scenes and object interactions
dimensions: object and relation state; physical interaction; temporal sequence; navigation; manipulation; goal-condition success; task completion

name: iGibson
title: Interactive Gibson Benchmark (iGibson 0.5): A Benchmark for Interactive Navigation in Cluttered Environments
scale: 15 fully interactive indoor scenes with robots and articulated objects
dimensions: 3D scene and object state; physical dynamics; sensor observation; navigation and manipulation action; collision; task success; sim-to-real transfer

name: PhysiCa-Bench
title: Inducing Causal World Models in LLMs for Zero-Shot Physical Reasoning
scale: 10,000 manually validated direct and counterfactual physical-reasoning examples
task: Predict physical outcomes before and after controlled interventions
dimensions: initial and final physical state; object properties; temporal outcome prediction; causal intervention effect; counterfactual consistency; direct-question accuracy

name: WoW-bench
title: World of Workflows: A Benchmark for Bringing World Models to Enterprise Systems
target: Enterprise Tool-Using Agent and World Model
scale: 234 tasks in a ServiceNow environment with 4,000+ business rules and 55 active workflows
task: Predict hidden workflow effects and complete constrained enterprise actions
dimensions: database state transition; cascading side effects; partial observability; workflow prediction; constraint reliability; tool action; task completion; oracle-audit gap

name: VideoScore-Bench-v2
title: VideoScore2: Think before You Score in Generative Video Evaluation
target: Generated-Video Evaluator and Video World Model
scale: 27,168 human-annotated videos with a 500-video in-domain benchmark split
task: Score and explain generated-video quality, text alignment, and physical consistency
dimensions: visual quality; text-video alignment; temporal coherence; physical and commonsense consistency; rationale quality; pairwise preference; point-score correlation

name: PhysicsArena
title: PhysicsArena: The First Multimodal Physics Reasoning Benchmark Exploring Variable, Process, and Solution Dimensions
scale: 5,103 multimodal physics problems across three difficulty levels and fourteen topic groups
task: Identify physical variables, formulate processes, and derive solutions from text and diagrams
dimensions: entity and field state; geometry and structure; interaction; external influence; process relationship; physical-law application; solution accuracy; difficulty transfer

name: CaST-Bench
title: CaST-Bench: Benchmarking Causal Chain-Grounded Spatio-Temporal Reasoning for Video Question Answering
scale: 2,066 questions over 1,015 videos with grounded causal-chain annotations
task: Answer causal video questions while localizing a multi-step evidence chain
dimensions: event order; cause and effect; predictive anticipation; counterfactual reasoning; temporal localization; spatial grounding; answer accuracy; evidence-answer faithfulness

name: PASTURE
title: CoWs on Pasture: Baselines and Benchmarks for Language-Driven Zero-Shot Object Navigation
scale: PASTURE task suite evaluated with over 90,000 aggregate navigation episodes across three environments
task: Find unseen objects from free-form descriptions without in-domain navigation training
dimensions: object identity and attributes; spatial relation; hidden-object relation; distractor discrimination; exploration; localization; navigation action; success; SPL

name: OccSTeP
title: OccSTeP: Benchmarking 4D Occupancy Spatio-Temporal Persistence
scale: Occ3D-nuScenes sequences transformed into four temporal-persistence challenge scenarios
task: Forecast future occupancy reactively and under queried ego trajectories despite corrupted history
dimensions: semantic occupancy; geometric persistence; long-horizon memory; missing or incorrect observations; ego-motion prediction; action-conditioned forecast; IoU; mIoU; planning response

name: DisCoBench
title: DisCo: World Models with Discrete Camera Motion Control
scale: 300 compositional image-action cases, 200 dynamic exploration videos, and long-horizon sequences of at least 241 frames
task: Generate short, dynamic, and long-horizon world rollouts that follow discrete camera-action sequences
dimensions: action adherence; compositional control; temporal coherence; subject consistency; background consistency; motion smoothness; dynamic-scene fidelity; long-horizon stability; visual quality

name: WorldTasks-Bench
title: World Model Self-Distillation: Training World Models to Solve General Tasks
scale: 146,440 training task prompts derived from 20,000 images and a 200-pair held-out benchmark
task: Generate a video in which the requested agent completes an embodied task with coherent world dynamics
dimensions: task completion; agent identity and engagement; navigation; spatial positioning; object interaction; scene perception; multi-step control; physical plausibility; temporal coherence

name: Latent Video World-Model Robustness Protocol
title: Latent Video Prediction Learns Better World Models
scale: Five controlled evaluation axes on Something-Something v2, including a 600-video discriminability slice and multi-severity perturbations
task: Test whether frozen video representations preserve usable action and dynamics information under corruption, occlusion, fine-grained contact changes, and time reversal
dimensions: feature discriminability; corruption robustness; contact-state sensitivity; missing-observation robustness; temporal direction; top-1 accuracy; accuracy retention; representation similarity; semantic reversal coherence

name: LiveBench
title: LiveWorld: Simulating Out-of-Sight Dynamics in Generative Video World Models
scale: 100 scenes and 400 camera-controlled evaluation sequences; each sequence spans 4 rounds and 260 frames at 16 FPS
task: Move the camera away from an active event and revisit while preserving background, entity identity, elapsed dynamics, and scripted outcomes
dimensions: out-of-sight event evolution; event success and presence; entity identity; spatial memory; background consistency; 3D dynamic-state agreement; camera revisit control; long-horizon video quality

name: LiDARCrafter Benchmark
title: LiDARCrafter: Dynamic 4D World Modeling from LiDAR Sequences
scale: nuScenes-based scene graphs with 10,000 generated samples for scene-level and layout-level evaluation
task: Generate or edit temporally coherent LiDAR scenes that follow object layouts, spatial relations, motion states, trajectories, and text controls
dimensions: range and point-cloud fidelity; BEV distribution; object detectability and geometry; temporal coherence; spatial-relation consistency; motion-state consistency; trajectory adherence; edit controllability

name: Video World-Model Policy Evaluation
title: Scalable Policy Evaluation with Video World Models
target: Robot Policy and Action-Conditioned Video World Model
scale: Synthetic RoboMimic and real-robot tasks with demonstration and policy-rollout datasets studied from 0.3M to 1.1M transitions
task: Roll out a policy's action sequence in a video world model, judge task completion, estimate policy value, and recover the ranking measured by execution
dimensions: policy-ranking agreement; predicted-versus-real value correlation; task-completion prediction; rollout fidelity; OOD action handling; physical consistency; calibration; dataset and pretraining sensitivity

name: EZSbench
title: ABot-PhysWorld: Interactive World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Physics Alignment
scale: Dual-branch real and synthetic zero-shot scene pool across robot, scene, task, and perspective axes, plus 200 structured action-to-video instances
task: Generate physically plausible manipulation videos for unseen robot-task-scene combinations and follow specified end-effector and gripper trajectories
dimensions: zero-shot generalization; physical realism; penetration and gravity violations; contact dynamics; instruction binding; action alignment; trajectory consistency; pixel and structural fidelity; temporal coherence

name: 4D Occupancy Forecasting Protocol
title: Point Cloud Forecasting as a Proxy for 4D Occupancy Forecasting
scale: nuScenes, KITTI-Odometry, and Argoverse 2 protocols with matched 1-second and 3-second future horizons across different LiDAR sensor rigs
task: Predict future world occupancy or render future LiDAR while separating scene dynamics from ego motion, sensor sampling, visibility, and occlusion
dimensions: continuous occupancy accuracy; occupied/free/unknown classification; geometric L1 error; point-cloud distance; short- and long-horizon forecasting; cross-sensor generalization; visibility awareness; static and dynamic geometry
